title: Zuri's Seasonal Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Zuri plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Zuri sees flowers. Spring is here!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, crouching behind blooming daffodils and tulips in soft spring pastels, her hands covering her eyes in peek-a-boo pose
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo behind spring flowers

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Zuri finds butterflies. Summer is bright!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind sunflowers with colorful butterflies flying around in vibrant summer colors, peeking through her fingers
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo with summer butterflies

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Zuri catches leaves. Autumn is golden!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playfully hiding behind a pile of orange, red, and golden autumn leaves, some leaves falling around her
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo in autumn leaves

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Zuri watches snowflakes. Winter is magical!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking from behind evergreen trees with gentle snowflakes falling in cool winter blues and whites
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo with winter snowflakes

pages.text: All year long, Zuri plays peek-a-boo with nature!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, standing in the center with four seasonal sections around her showing spring flowers, summer butterflies, autumn leaves, and winter snow
illustration.alt: Zuri surrounded by all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri find in spring?
questions.explanation: Zuri finds beautiful flowers blooming in spring!

questions.question: What flies around in summer?
questions.explanation: Colorful butterflies fly around the summer flowers!

questions.question: What falls in winter?
questions.explanation: Pretty snowflakes fall gently in winter!
